build.detail: taktician_validate_all passed. 0 errors, 0 warnings in Footer block files. 9 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings remain in other blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) — unrelated to Footer. Sync check passes with the known-benign InspectorControls root wrapper warning (FooterInfo.tsx editor wrapper vs PHP section — expected false-positive). Registration passes with 0 issues.

fixSourceVerification.detail: Fix correctly applied on lines 31–40. Pattern uses two-step guard: (1) pre-render logo output via theme_output_svg_or_img($logoId, false) into $logo_output variable, (2) wraps entire logo div in <?php if (!empty($logo_output)) : ?> so the anchor and its container are suppressed entirely when no logo is set or the media output is empty. Docblock and @var annotations intact. No $attributes extraction anti-pattern present.
fixSourceVerification.codeSnapshot:
$logo_output = ! empty( $logoId ) ? theme_output_svg_or_img( $logoId, false ) : ''; if ( ! empty( $logo_output ) ) : // render
logo
endif;

renderedOutput.detail: Page audit across all 7 footer sections confirms fix is live.

sectionsWithLogo.assessment: PASS — logo renders correctly; anchor wraps an SVG/image so page_audit reports href='/' with empty text content (expected: SVG has no text node). The :empty CSS selector correctly returns 0 because the anchor contains child elements.

sectionsWithoutLogo.assessment: PASS — logo area (div.mb-8 and anchor) is entirely absent from all sections without a logo set. No empty anchors in any section.

globalEmptyAnchors.assessment: PASS — no :empty anchor elements on the page

passedChecks: Build passes with 0 errors in Footer block
FooterInfo.php fix correctly guards logo anchor behind theme_output_svg_or_img() pre-check
Sections with logos (2) render logo div and anchor correctly with aria-label
Sections without logos (5) render no logo div and no anchor — entirely suppressed
No empty <a> elements detected anywhere on the page across all 7 footer instances
FQA-001 resolved — empty anchor accessibility issue is fixed

resolvedIssues.verifiedBy: page_audit :empty selector across all 7 footer sections + logoAnchor/logoDiv selector presence check
